title: taraxacum pannonicum
intro: Taraxacum pannonicum, also known as Hungarian dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum pannonicum include its potential to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Taraxacum pannonicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, flowers, and roots are also used in herbal remedies.
